title: ComputationEvidenceCatalogItemV1
description: A single entry in computation_evidence_catalog_v1.jsonl. Records the outputs of a hep-calc skill run, keyed by source identifiers. Intentionally distinct from EvidenceCatalogItemV1 (which requires paper_id + LatexLocatorV1 and is LaTeX-only). Computation evidence does not have a paper_id and uses artifact paths + SHA-256 instead of LaTeX locators.

schema_version.description: Schema version, always 1 for this schema.

run_id.description: ID of the orchestrator run that produced these artifacts.

step_id.description: ID of the specific computation step within the run (matches manifest step.id).

skill_id.description: Identifier of the hep-calc skill that produced the artifacts (e.g. 'hep-calc/mathematica-feyncalc').

path.description: Path to the artifact file, relative to run_dir or as an ArtifactRef URI (artifact://<run_id>/<step_id>/<filename>).

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the artifact file (64 lowercase hex characters).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this artifact contains.

artifacts.description: Artifact files produced by this computation step, with SHA-256 integrity checksums.

manifest_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the computation_manifest_v1.json file used for this computation. Provides a cryptographic pointer back to the exact computation specification.

ingested_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this entry was ingested via hep_run_ingest_skill_artifacts.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about this computation result.
